generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring electrical input current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MabiRobotLiveData
]

instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder providing motor shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MabiRobotLiveData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox encoder providing gearwheel output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MabiRobotLiveData
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (Data transmitted via MQTT)
instance MabiRobotLiveData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Live MQTT stream containing input current I_M, output angle, and derived torque, angular velocity, acceleration"
]

// C10: Live data instances (produced from the MQTT stream)
instance LiveCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M streamed from the robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MabiRobotLiveData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance LiveAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of output angle (gearbox) streamed from the robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MabiRobotLiveData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance LiveTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque time‑series computed from current and angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MabiRobotLiveData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance LiveAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity time‑series computed from angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MabiRobotLiveData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance LiveAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration time‑series computed from velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MabiRobotLiveData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

// C10: Simulated data traces (output of Simulink models)
instance SimulatedCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current trace generated by friction‑less Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace generated by analytical friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity trace produced by Simulink analytical friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular acceleration trace produced by Simulink analytical friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling and infrastructure)
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling used to create block‑definition and internal‑block diagrams of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing friction‑less and analytical friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, SimulationComparisonService, FrictionModelUpdateService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transporting live sensor streams to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASRegistry : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell registry providing unique identification of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelVisualizationService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard hosting real‑time visualizations of live and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, StructuralModelVisualizationService
]

// C10: Models (engineering and simulation)
instance SysMLStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block‑definition and internal‑block diagrams describing motor, gearwheel gearbox, and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model representing the robot axis without friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing LuGre friction formulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C6: Services offered by the digital twin
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying live and simulated data streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters from live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlTuningDecisionInsight, MaintenanceDecisionInsight
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured data to assess model fidelity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComparativeAnalysisInsight
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation and deployment of updated friction models for controller tuning"
    DTDFVocab:provides FeedFrictionParametersAction, UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance StructuralModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of SysML structural models within the web dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters fed back to the controller improve motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlTuningDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction models support decision making on control tuning"
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model‑based insights enable proactive maintenance planning"
]

instance ComparativeAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated and measured data reveals deviations and model gaps"
]

instance StructuralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model provides a complete view of the motor‑gearbox‑cycloidal assembly"
]

// C17: Actions
instance FeedFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic feeding of identified friction parameters to the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual or semi‑automatic update of friction model definitions in the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow follows a one‑way data flow and does not send commands back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation during robot motion, with data traces updated at the sensor sampling rate (unspecified, but streamed live)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical robot axis with sensors → MQTT broker → processing components (simulation models) → data traces stored in the digital shadow → visualization dashboard; all components linked by the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is running to continuously identify friction and improve control accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Combination of white‑box analytical friction models and black‑box data‑driven models; continuous online identification to capture wear, temperature, load effects; traceability of each data point to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated outputs with measured reference data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used to stream sensor measurements from the robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shell (AAS) aligns with Industry 4.0 standards; SysML modeling follows OMG standards."
]
